name: docling-mcp
description: Docling MCP Server - Document processing and analysis with Docling Serve and local conversion support

version.title: Version
version.description: Version of the docling-mcp package to install.

install_extras.title: Installation Extras
install_extras.description: Optional extras to install. Options: '' (remote-only, lightweight), '[local]' (local conversion), '[local,llama-index-rag]', '[local,llama-stack]'

conversion_mode.title: Conversion Mode
conversion_mode.description: Choose 'remote' for Docling Serve or 'local' for local conversion. Remote mode requires service_url. Local mode requires the [local] extra. Default: remote

service_url.title: Docling Service URL
service_url.description: Docling Serve base URL for remote mode. Do not include /v1. Example: https://your-docling-serve-instance.example.com

service_api_key.title: Service API Key
service_api_key.description: API key for authenticated Docling Serve instances. The MCP server sends this value as the X-Api-Key header. Leave empty for unauthenticated services.

service_timeout.title: Service Timeout (seconds)
service_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for remote jobs and HTTP reads. Range: 10-3600, Default: 3600

service_max_retries.title: Service Max Retries
service_max_retries.description: Maximum HTTP retries for Docling Serve requests. Default: 3

fallback_to_local.title: Fallback to Local
fallback_to_local.description: If remote service is unavailable, automatically fall back to local conversion (requires [local] extra).

keep_images.title: Keep Images
keep_images.description: Generate and store page images while converting documents in local mode.

do_ocr.title: Enable OCR
do_ocr.description: Enable OCR for scanned documents. Applies to remote conversion and local conversion.

force_ocr.title: Force OCR
force_ocr.description: Force OCR even when text is available. Applies to remote conversion and supported local Docling versions.

ocr_preset.title: OCR Preset
ocr_preset.description: OCR engine preset for remote conversion. Accepted values depend on Docling; common values are auto, easyocr, tesseract, rapidocr.

do_table_structure.title: Enable Table Structure
do_table_structure.description: Enable table structure recognition. Applies to remote conversion and local conversion.

table_mode.title: Table Mode
table_mode.description: Table structure mode. Accepted values: fast, accurate.

pdf_backend.title: PDF Backend
pdf_backend.description: PDF backend for remote conversion. Accepted values depend on Docling; common values include docling_parse, pypdfium2, dlparse_v1, dlparse_v2, dlparse_v4.

abort_on_error.title: Abort on Error
abort_on_error.description: Abort remote conversion on document processing errors.

include_images.title: Include Images
include_images.description: Include images in remote conversion output. Use false with placeholder export mode to avoid large image payloads.

image_export_mode.title: Image Export Mode
image_export_mode.description: Remote image export mode. Accepted values: placeholder, embedded, referenced.

do_code_enrichment.title: Code Enrichment
do_code_enrichment.description: Enable code enrichment for supported Docling conversions.

do_formula_enrichment.title: Formula Enrichment
do_formula_enrichment.description: Enable formula enrichment. Useful for scientific papers, but adds processing time.

do_picture_classification.title: Picture Classification
do_picture_classification.description: Enable picture classification for supported Docling conversions.

do_picture_description.title: Picture Description
do_picture_description.description: Enable picture description for supported Docling conversions.
